title: API keys
description: Manage the keys your sync agents use to authenticate against the ingestion API.
onlySuperusersCreate: Only superusers can create API keys.
securityNotice: Raw key values are only shown once at generation time. Store them securely in your deployment's secret manager.
cardDescription: Each tenant maintains an independent set of credentials.

selectTenant.title: Select a tenant
selectTenant.description: Choose a tenant from the switcher to manage its API keys.

emptyDescription: Generate the first credential to start ingesting telemetry.
revokeConfirm: Revoke API key "{{label}}"? This action cannot be undone.

modal.generateDescription: Issue a new credential for this tenant's sync agent.
modal.createdDescription: Copy and store this key now — it will not be shown again.
modal.labelHelper: A short, recognizable name for this key.
modal.expiresHelper: Leave blank for a non-expiring key.
modal.oneTimeBody: For security, this raw key will never be shown again. Save it now in your secret manager.
modal.copyFailed: Could not copy automatically — please copy manually.
